decisions.decision: Embed analytics into existing pages: per-market analytics (price history, volume, top traders) as a collapsible section in MarketDetail; account-level P&L as a section in Portfolio. No new top-level route.
alternatives_rejected: New /analytics top-level route — fragments UX, adds nav complexity for MVP
New /markets/:id/analytics sub-route — unnecessary indirection when MarketDetail already shows market data

decisions.decision: Compute cost basis by aggregating from ORDERS at query time. EventTrade.notional for directional trades, ProbabilityEdit.impactScore for LMSR edits. No schema changes to position state.
alternatives_rejected: Add running cost_basis field to position projection — requires modifying sync_account_exposure_state and backfilling existing positions, too invasive for first iteration

decisions.decision: Provide both per-market and per-account P&L, each with unrealized and realized components. Two endpoints: GET /v1/accounts/{id}/pnl and GET /v1/markets/{id}/accounts/{accountId}/pnl.
alternatives_rejected: Account-level only — loses per-market granularity that's natural for the MarketDetail view
Per-market only — forces frontend to aggregate manually for Portfolio

decisions.decision: Use recharts for price history and volume charts. It is React-native, composable, tree-shakeable (~40KB gzipped), and avoids building time-series axes/tooltips/formatting from scratch.
alternatives_rejected: Plain HTML/CSS — time-series charts need axes, tooltips, responsive sizing; disproportionate effort vs. library
SVG polyline sparklines — no interactivity (tooltips, hover)

decisions.decision: Reuse existing GET /v1/markets/{id}/analytics for price_history, volume, top_traders. Only new backend work is P&L endpoints.
alternatives_rejected: New cross-market analytics endpoint — out of scope for MVP, System page already shows aggregate stats

decisions.decision: Use polling via React Query (10-30s refetchInterval) for analytics data. No WebSocket extension.
alternatives_rejected: WebSocket real-time updates — analytics data is aggregated/historical, doesn't need sub-second updates

steps.task: Backend: Implement P&L computation helper that calculates cost basis from ORDERS (EventTrade.notional for buys/sells, ProbabilityEdit.impactScore for LMSR edits) and computes unrealized P&L (netSize * currentMarginal - costBasis) and realized P&L (settlementValue - costBasis for resolved markets).
Backend: Add GET /v1/markets/{marketId}/accounts/{accountId}/pnl endpoint returning per-market P&L breakdown (unrealized, realized, total, cost_basis, current_value) per outcome.
Backend: Add GET /v1/accounts/{accountId}/pnl endpoint returning account-level P&L aggregated across all markets (per-market breakdown + totals).
Frontend: Install recharts dependency (npm install recharts).
Frontend: Add API client functions and React Query hooks for the two new P&L endpoints (useMarketPnl, useAccountPnl) and ensure useMarketAnalytics is wired up.
Frontend: Build MarketAnalytics component with price history line chart (recharts LineChart), volume bar chart, and top traders table. Render as a collapsible section in MarketDetail page.
Frontend: Build PnLSummary component showing per-market P&L (unrealized, realized, total) and integrate into MarketDetail page alongside the analytics section.
Frontend: Build AccountPnL component showing account-wide P&L with per-market breakdown table and totals. Integrate into Portfolio page.
Integration test: Verify P&L endpoints return correct values using resolved market m3 as test case for realized P&L, and active markets for unrealized P&L.
End-to-end verification: Confirm MarketDetail shows analytics section with charts and P&L, Portfolio shows account P&L, polling refreshes data correctly.

children.title: Backend P&L Endpoints
children.description: Implement P&L computation helper and two new REST endpoints: GET /v1/markets/{marketId}/accounts/{accountId}/pnl (per-market P&L) and GET /v1/accounts/{accountId}/pnl (account-level P&L). Cost basis derived from ORDERS aggregation. Covers steps 1-3 and 9.

children.title: Frontend Analytics Dashboard Components
children.description: Install recharts, add API hooks for P&L endpoints, build MarketAnalytics component (price history chart, volume chart, top traders), PnLSummary component (per-market P&L), and AccountPnL component (account-wide P&L in Portfolio). Integrate into MarketDetail and Portfolio pages. Covers steps 4-8 and 10.
